name: HTTP server on ephemeral port
command: const s = Bun.serve({ port: 0, fetch: () => new Response('ok') }); console.log('port', s.port); console.log('stop_len', s.stop.length); s.stop();

name: File write and read
command: const path = '/tmp/bun-oneliner-test.txt'; await Bun.write(path, 'hello from bun'); console.log('content', await Bun.file(path).text()); require('fs').unlinkSync(path);

name: Runtime version and revision
command: console.log('version', Bun.version); console.log('rev_len', Bun.revision.length);

name: Password hashing and verification
command: const h = Bun.password.hashSync('s3cret'); console.log('hash_prefix', h.substring(0, 5)); console.log('verify_ok', Bun.password.verifySync('s3cret', h)); console.log('verify_bad', Bun.password.verifySync('wrong', h));

name: SHA-256 hashing
command: const h = new Bun.CryptoHasher('sha256').update('bradley-terry').digest('hex'); console.log('sha256', h.substring(0, 12)); console.log('len', h.length);

name: gzip compression roundtrip
command: const data = new TextEncoder().encode('compress me '.repeat(10)); const c = Bun.gzipSync(data); const d = Bun.gunzipSync(c); console.log('ratio', (c.length / data.length).toFixed(2)); console.log('matches', new TextDecoder().decode(d) === 'compress me '.repeat(10));

name: TOML parsing
command: const toml = 'name = \"bt\"\n[settings]\nport = 3000'; const obj = Bun.TOML.parse(toml); console.log('name', obj.name); console.log('port', obj.settings.port);

name: Environment variable access
command: process.env.BT_ONELINER_TEST = 'yes'; console.log('env', Bun.env.BT_ONELINER_TEST); console.log('noenv', Bun.env.BT_ONELINER_MISSING || 'undefined');

name: nanoseconds timing
command: const a = Bun.nanoseconds(); Bun.sleepSync(1); const b = Bun.nanoseconds(); console.log('delta_gt_0', (b - a) > 0); console.log('type', typeof a === 'number' ? 'number' : 'other');

name: UUIDv7 generation
command: const id = Bun.randomUUIDv7(); console.log('len', id.length); console.log('version_char', id[14]); console.log('format', /^[0-9a-f-]+$/.test(id));

name: stringWidth CJK measurement
command: console.log('ascii', Bun.stringWidth('hello')); console.log('cjk', Bun.stringWidth('你好')); console.log('emoji', Bun.stringWidth('🚀'));

name: sleep async delay
command: const start = Date.now(); await Bun.sleep(50); console.log('slept_ms_ge', Date.now() - start >= 40);

name: bun --smol memory-constrained run
command: console.log('smol_ok', true);

name: bun run - stdin pipe
command: process.stdin.setEncoding('utf-8'); let d = ''; process.stdin.on('data', c => d += c); process.stdin.on('end', () => console.log('stdin', d.trim()));

name: deflate compression roundtrip
command: const d='deflate-test'.repeat(20); const e=new TextEncoder().encode(d); const c=Bun.deflateSync(e); const u=new TextDecoder().decode(Bun.inflateSync(c)); console.log('ok', u===d); console.log('ratio', (c.length/e.length).toFixed(2));

name: zstd compression with level
command: const d='zstd-test'.repeat(30); const e=new TextEncoder().encode(d); const c=Bun.zstdCompressSync(e,{level:6}); console.log('ok', new TextDecoder().decode(Bun.zstdDecompressSync(c))===d);

name: HTML entity escaping
command: console.log('amp', Bun.escapeHTML('a & b')); console.log('lt', Bun.escapeHTML('<x>')); console.log('qt', Bun.escapeHTML('"hi"'));

name: deepEquals structural comparison
command: const a={x:[1,{y:2}]}; console.log('eq', Bun.deepEquals(a,{x:[1,{y:2}]})); console.log('neq', Bun.deepEquals(a,{x:[1,{y:3}]})); console.log('strict', Bun.deepEquals({},{a:undefined},true));

name: peek synchronous promise inspection
command: const p=Promise.resolve(42); console.log('val', Bun.peek(p)); console.log('stat', Bun.peek.status(p));

name: resolveSync module resolution
command: const p=Bun.resolveSync('bun:sqlite', import.meta.dir); console.log('ok', typeof p==='string' && p.length>0);

name: ArrayBufferSink incremental buffer
command: const s=new Bun.ArrayBufferSink(); s.start(); s.write('hello'); s.write('world'); console.log('out', new TextDecoder().decode(s.end()));

name: semver satisfies range check
command: console.log('ok', Bun.semver.satisfies('1.4.0', '>=1.3.0')); console.log('no', Bun.semver.satisfies('1.3.6', '>=1.4.0'));

name: semver order comparison
command: console.log('lt', Bun.semver.order('1.3.0', '1.4.0')); console.log('gt', Bun.semver.order('2.0.0', '1.0.0')); console.log('eq', Bun.semver.order('1.0.0', '1.0.0'));

name: color hex and number conversion
command: console.log('red_hex', Bun.color('red', 'hex')); console.log('blue_num', Bun.color('blue', 'number'));

name: Transpiler TS to JS
command: const t=new Bun.Transpiler({loader:'ts'}); const js=t.transformSync('const x:number=1'); console.log('has_const', js.includes('const')); console.log('no_type', !js.includes(':number'));
